snippet.title: Khichdi 2 | Harsh Beniwal
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Copytrading App at http://bit.ly/Beniwal_OctaFX and get 50% bonus for your first-time copying! 🎁 Let the best professional traders make money for you!💰

Cherry, who is in love with Ritu is all set to meet Ritu's brother, tables turn when Ritu's brother turns out to be his bestfriend, there starts a bridge of lies that Cherry creates, because he has clearly broken the bro code and doesn't want his bestfriend to know about this, will this bridge sustain or collapse badly, let's find out.

Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te

Mere geet utte ne sharabi nachde
Khadki jande ne ni glass kach de
Khadke de vicho mennu saaj sunn de
Saaja' vicho' kann teri vaaj sunn de
Teri vaaj vicho' tera moonh dikhdai
Tere moonh nu dekh dekh Kaka geet likhdai

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri
Teria grifta' ch Dil hai mera
Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakе bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
Jithе mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k
Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri te

snippet.title: R NAIT : U Turn (Official Video) | Ft. Shipra Goyal | Jeona & Jogi | New Punjabi Song 2020/2021
snippet.description:
Our Defaulter "R Nait" is back with another New Punjabi Song 2021 "U Turn" Ft. Shipra Goyal.Music by  Laddi Gill and Lyrics written by R Nait Himself. Dircted by Jeona & Jogi. Produced By Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu.This song portrays that now a days love is all about lust,money & attraction.

Tere nalo vakh sachi ese gaalo hoi ve si

Ajj kal cheti veere bhar jande dil 
Sachi pyar zindabad si paigama vich reh geya 
Kade tonna vich hunda si pyar tutt paini da

Tonna vich hunda si pyar tutt paini da

Kar dena barbeque si saale dil da

Kar dena barbeque si saale dil da

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3031 - Full Episode - 6th November 2020
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch full episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZFhouqhrvP3Sx0U7qxdzJi

Episode 3031: Jetha Must Wake Up Early
------------------------------------------------------------------
Jetha is passing time over WhatsApp and reading jokes when Bapuji and Tapu enter the room. Bapuji asks Jetha if he has decided to wake up late on the very first day. When Jetha tells him that he isn't sleepy yet, Bappuji tells him that no one will wake Jetha up the next morning. He must do it on his own.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: That Irritating Uncle | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Whatever gender you are, after reaching certain age, wherever we go we are bombarded with the same question, When are you getting married? When is your turn? etc.
After certain point of time it really gets on our nerve but we cannot express our anger or irritation towards them. So this video expresses those feelings for you all who are in that space. Enjoy.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unimited Team

snippet.title: Pre Teaser of Radhe Shyam | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Glimpse on February 14th
snippet.description:
Pre Teaser Of Radhe Shyam On UV Creations. Radhe Shyam is an upcoming Indian romantic drama film starring Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. The film is presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. Movie is Shot simultaneously in Telugu, Tamil and Hindi. Also starring Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others. Cinematography  Manoj Paramahamsa. Music Theme by Mithoon. Art Director Ravinder.

A Glimpse on February 14th. Save the Date.

snippet.title: Chithi 2 - Promo | 06 Feb 2021 | Sun TV Serial | Tamil Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Latest promo of the Tamil Serial #Chithi 2 that airs on Sun TV.

You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021
 
Watch Chithi 2 Mon-Sat @ 9.30 PM on Sun TV. 

Chithi 2, is a whole new story., about yet another ‘Chithi’, our kind-hearted and brave-spirited Saradha. Her portrayal of love, forgiveness, sacrifice, fierceness, and perseverance towards her family, through the thick and thin of life, makes one believe in the power of family. Watch and travel along with Saradha’s offbeat family.

snippet.title: VK Sasikala pays tribute to late Tamil Nadu CM Jayalalithaa, returns to Chennai after 4 years
snippet.description:
#VKSasikala #TamilNadu
Expelled AIADMK leader V.K. Sasikala returned to poll-bound Tamil Nadu after 4 years Monday. Ahead of the journey to Chennai from Bengaluru, Sasikala and T.T.V. Dhinakaran offered floral tribute to late Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Jayalalithaa. Sasikala will meet her sister-in-law on 8 February in Chennai.

snippet.title: Gajendra Verma | Ratjage | Summary - Chapter 03
snippet.description:
Official Video of Gajendra Verma's - "Ratjage" from the Album "Summary" - Chapter 03 

"Summary - A Musical Series" is a romantic tale. The story starts with the first song and ends with the fifth song. A musical series on the summary of love taking romance to a whole new level along with the most beloved pair essayed by singer Gajendra Verma and beautiful Manasi Moghe. 

Listen Here:
http://bit.ly/Ratjage_AppleMusic
http://bit.ly/Ratjage-iTunes
http://bit.ly/Ratjage_Spotify
http://bit.ly/Ratjage_Hungama
http://bit.ly/Ratjage_WynkMusic
http://bit.ly/Ratjage_JioSaavn

Watch Here Chapter 01-02 - Mushkil Badi
http://bit.ly/Gajendra_Verma-MushkilBadi-OfficialVideo
http://bit.ly/Gajendra-Verma_KitnaMazaAayega

Subscribe to the Gajendra Verma Channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances
http://bit.ly/SubscribeToGajendraVerma

See more official videos from Gajendra Verma here: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0KNk-Joi-NM&list=PLTGJmH_RBpkEI18DUASS-BUKBCCcI679u

Connect with Gajendra Verma:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/iVermaGajendra
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ivermagajen...
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ivermagajendra

AUDIO CREDITS

Singer & Music: Gajendra Verma
Lyrics: Aseem Ahmed Abbasee
Mastering: Navneeth Balachanderan

VIDEO CREDITS

Direction & Story By: Vikram Singh
Starring:  Gajendra Verma, Manasi Moghe, Ömür Orçun Alioğlu, Komeil Vaez
Dialogues: Aseem Ahmed Abbasee
Cinematographer: Suman Dutta       
Asst. Dir: Devender Dah     
Editor: Gagan Sharma 
D.I Colourist: Nirmal Sharma/Future Works        
Publicity Design: Kanak Gaikwad         
VFX Studio: LetsVFX 
Costume Stylist: Ankita Patel     
Line Production: Line Production Turkey        
Line Producer: Uluc Yemen Aslan 
Line Producer India: Bijal Sunil Majithiya       
Production Manager: Hazal Caglayan        
Drone Pilot : Oğuz Albayrak 
Drone Camera: Sinan kılıç
Production Team:  Erhan Caylak & Gizem Demir 
Production Asst: Riad Afandiyev    
Makeup: Tamay Esintimur          
Makeup Asst: Selin Arier 
Makeup (Posters): Anshu Gautam
PR Team: Shruti Dahibavkar & Harish Pednekar
Digital Marketing: Abhay Ranjan
Social Media: Jasmeet Kaur, Bhisham Soni
Agency: Qyuki Digital Media
Record Label: Virtual Planet Music
Virtual Planet Team: Akshay Jain, Krishna Kishore, Preet Bhullar, Mohit Rajyaguru, Sourabh Swami & Amit Kumar

LYRICS

Ishq mein ratjage,
Hain hone ab lage,
Kare ye dil kya...
Tu hai mehram mera
Mein bas hun tera
To Mushkil kya...
Tujhko khud mein utaar lun
Jaise seene mein saansein...
Bin tere andar hi andar
Gadti hain mere faasein...

Tu, tu yaara mera dil
Tu yaara meri jaan
Tu har armaan...
Haan tu sang hain mere
Main Shukre Khuda
Main sajde kara...

Chandasa Mukhda tera,
Aise aankhon mein bhara
Jaise hothon pe dhara tera naam....
Bin tere na din uga
Na to raaton ka paata
Sari duniya mein sham hi sham...
Tere sang sang chali gayi..
Mere hasne ki baatein...
Meri aankhon ke niche ab
Aagayi Kaali raatein....

Tu, tu yaara mera dil
Tu yaara meri jaan
Tu har armaan...
Haan tu sang hain mere
Main Shukre Khuda
Main sajde kara

Channa Ve teri yaad sataye
Channa Ve mujhe chain na aaye
Channa Ve tu jo laut ke aaye
To dil mera shukar manaye
Aajave meri dhoopo ke saaye
Aajave mujhe meh jalaye
Aajave mujhe hizar mitaye
Mile to mujhe sab miljaye


For Live Shows Bookings & Business Enquiries: 
Prashant Chaudhary +919988989833

© 2021, Virtual Planet Production Pvt. Ltd.
#Summary #GajendraVerma #Ratjage #TopHits2021 #PopSongs2021

snippet.description:
Check out this ultimate battle of roomies vs ration ft. Gagan Arora, Nikhil Vijay, Badri & Anushka.

Our partners in the show: 
Urban Gabru -  https://amzn.to/3jaBNVM
Royal Swag - https://www.amazon.in/gp/product/B07MHWP48P


With the drama of secretly stealing food to totally turning against each other, these #roomies share their craziest experiences. Logically, a roommate is someone who helps in taking some of the financial burdens that come with renting a living space. If they are going to make life turn upside down. Is it really worth it? Decide at your own risk. #roomiesS1 #episode1

So if you also have a roomie then all you need to do is stay tuned till the end. Hit the like button, share with your friends, and subscribe to our channel, Alright for more such short funny videos: http://bit.ly/alrightsquad

#roommates #webseries

snippet.title: Kundali Bhagya: Trouble in Kritika & Akshay's wedding
snippet.description:
Watch the report of Saas Bahu Aur Saazish to know the latest updates from the sets of the serial Kundali Bhagya. Have a look at how choas erupted in Kritika & Akshay's wedding. Stay connected for regular updates on top entertainment stories. 

Watch Saas Bahu aur Saazish (SBS) on ABP News daily at 2:30 PM to know what's happening in Indian television and bollywood industry with Aditi Arora Sawant. Presenting you the latest updates and daily dose of entertainment in the form of star cast interviews, gossips, updates of reality shows, behind the scenes, twist in serials. Join the non stop entertainment with Saas Bahu aur Saazish for all the juicy news.

टेलीविजन और बॉलीवुड इंडस्ट्री के बारे में जानने के लिए एबीपी न्यूज़ पर देखिये सास बहु और साज़िश (एसबीएस) अदिति रॉव सावंत के साथ  रोज़ाना 2:30 बजे। एसबीएस पेश करता है स्टार कास्ट के इंटरव्यू, रियलिटी शो के अपडेट, सीरियल्स के नए मोड़, परदे के पीछे की कुछ गपशप और भी बहुत कुछ। नॉन स्टॉप मनोरंजन के लिए शामिल हों सास बहू और साज़िश के साथ।

snippet.title: F9 - The Big Game Spot
snippet.description:
F9
www.thefastsaga.com

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past. 

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.  

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad). 

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.  

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.  

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario - The Reality | Jump Cuts | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Make meaningful connections without stepping out of your house. Download happn now :
http://gethap.pn/Iw5k
--
For Business Enquiries : jumpcuts16@gmail.com
___________________________________

Have you had a savage ghost video or ghost in the house? Jump Cuts presents a video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. 

Suddenly, he sees Ramesh standing there. His body shivered with fear. Ramesh kept his hand on his friend’s shoulder and was about to tell a secret. Just when he opened his mouth, the phone rang. It’s Ramesh’s mother’s call. He learns from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

Why did Ramesh call his friend to the terrace? What secret does he want to say? 

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario” - a scary short video. Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #ghostinhouse #Jumpcuts
___________________________________

snippet.title: Tumhe Dekh Ke - Official Video | Salman Ali, Mateena | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha P | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
Get ready to fall in love this Valentine's Day with ‘Tumhe Dekh Ke’, a quintessential romantic ballad by composers Salim - Sulaiman, with the video set in various parts of Kashmir. It’s a love story of a young couple in the valley, where the boy is expressing his feelings for the girl and how every moment they share takes him into a trance. The video features Salman Ali who has also lent his voice to the song.

🎧 Listen to & Download "Tumhe Dekh Ke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6NiyO5E6ALWR5LznZPlaJx?si=kUGaQcbsRQ6zhSRS6go6cQ

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/tumhe-dekh-ke-single/1551366524

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke-1

JioSaavn:https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/QSU5SAZ,WXI

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/or_196006028565_ING642100104

Hungama Music: https://www.hungama.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/61980788/

To Set "Tumhe Dekh Ke" Your Caller Tune: 
Vodafone Customers Dial 53712311217
Idea Customers Dial 5678912311217
BSNL Customers Dial 5678912311217

Audio Credits
Music Composed & Produced by : Salim - Sulaiman
Lyrics : Shradha Pandit
Singer : Salman Ali
Additional Music Production : Raj Pandit
Guitars : Ankur Mukherjee
Dholak : Aslam Dafrani, Navin Sharma
Tabla : Navin Sharma
Rabab : Irfan Nabi
Live Strings : Budapest Art Orchestra
Live Strings Orchestrated by : Samarth Srinivasan
Recorded by : Aftab Khan & Raj Pandit at Blue Productions
Mixed & Mastered by : Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio
Distributed by Global Music Junction

Video Credits
Director/ D.O.P : Tassaduq Hussain Baba
Executive Producer : Radhika Mistry
DA : Bisma Farooq
AD : Rouf Fida
Editor : Abhishek Seth
Colour Grade : Black Acid Production
First AC : Arif Bashir Wani 
2nd AC : Rouf Fida
Production Head : Mehraj Bhat 
Production Assistant : Zeeshan Farooq 
Production Assistant : Zubair Hamid Khan 
Best Boy : Farzan Shakeel
Best Boy Grip : Nadeem Farooq 
Transport : Farooq Ahmad
Line Producer : Misba Ali

Cast: 
Featuring 
Mateena Rajput 
Father : Lone Bashir
Mother : Jameela Akther
Casting Director : Shaarika Pandit (ShaariCast)

Managed by : Nirav Thakar, Radhika Mistry
Digital Strategy : Shivansh Jindal
Album Creatives : Dishant Mistry
PR: Lily Ahluwalia

Lyrics:

Yun toh bahut haseen chehre dekhe hai
Kise se ishq ho jaana toh, khuda ki marzi hoti hai, khuda ki marzi hoti hai

Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai
Tumhe dekhke lagta hai
Jannat se barsi dua hai

Dil mein basa lo sanam
Ke bin tere jeena kya hai
Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai

Pooche duniya 
Kya hai yeh maajara 
dil ka yeh hashar kya kahein 

Chhupta hai kahaan 
yeh rang hai pyaar ka
Kiska hai asar kya kahein

Hum toh izhaar-e-mohabbat karenge
tu jo ishaara kare
Aakhir yeh zindagi tumhari hai
Tumhi se jahaan hai 

Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai
Tumhe dekhke lagta hai
Jannat se barsi dua hai

Dil mein basa lo sanam
Ke bin tere jeena kya hai
Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Magic Bottle 2 | Laughing Soda
snippet.description:
#Laughingsoda #Leelaigal #MagicBottle

Laughing Soda presents "Magic Bottle 2" - a Tamil comedy video. In the previous video, you show how friends used the bottle to play truth or dare.

In this video, Swetha picks the same dirty bottle, and as she is about to put it in the trash, she hears the bottle speaking. Holding the bottle in her hand, she says the magical lines four times.

What you see next will surprise you. Watch Swetha's wishes come true in this Tamil funny video. She gets chocolate and meets all her school friends.

snippet.title: Smartness doesn't come through books. How to learn Emotional Intelligence: Dr. Vikas Divyakirti.
snippet.description:
प्रिय व्यूअर्स, 

Interesting Moments की इस सीरीज़ में हम डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की हिंदी साहित्य, एथिक्स और निबंध की क्लासेज की छोटी -छोटी वीडियो क्लिप्स साझा कर रहे हैं। इन वीडियोज़ से आप यह सीख पाएंगे कि कैसे कठिन से कठिन बातों को भी आसानी से सीखा जा सकता है। सर के पढ़ाने का रोचक तरीका सहज ही विषय के प्रति रुचि जगा देता है। जब आप इनसे गुजरेंगे तो इस बात को महसूस कर सकेंगे। इसमें मोटिवेशन, हास्य विनोद तथा जीवन से जुड़ी कुछ महत्त्वपूर्ण बातें होती हैं।

यह वीडियो क्लिप डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की एथिक्स क्लास की है। इस वीडियो के माध्यम से आप यह समझ पाएंगे कि सीखने के अलग-अलग तरीकों में कौन-सा बेहतर है? आमतौर पर हम किताबों से ही जीवन की हर सीख प्राप्त कर लेना चाहते हैं, लेकिन व्यावहारिक रूप से ऐसा संभव नहीं होता। एक सीमा के बाद सीखने की यह पद्धति काम नहीं आती। इस वीडियो में सर इसी विषय पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं कि बेहतर व्यक्तित्व के लिये सीखने की प्रक्रिया को किस प्रकार साधा जाना चाहिये। प्रसिद्ध मनोवैज्ञानिक डेनियल गोलमेन के सिद्धांत को सर रोचक उदाहरण के माध्यम से बता रहे हैं।

#ShortVideos #VikasSir #InterestingMoments

=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵

𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐅𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞 (𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐬 + 𝐌𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬) 𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞:

👉 For 𝐟𝐞𝐞, 𝐀𝐝𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 and 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 of this course download the 𝐃𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐭𝐢 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐀𝐩𝐩 from this link: https://bit.ly/3bqTzjH

👉 To know the 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 through our website click on this link: https://bit.ly/2JF1cJx

𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐬 (𝐇𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐢 𝐋𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐈𝐀𝐒 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐬):

localized.title: Smartness doesn't come through books. How to learn Emotional Intelligence: Dr. Vikas Divyakirti.
localized.description:
प्रिय व्यूअर्स, 

Interesting Moments की इस सीरीज़ में हम डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की हिंदी साहित्य, एथिक्स और निबंध की क्लासेज की छोटी -छोटी वीडियो क्लिप्स साझा कर रहे हैं। इन वीडियोज़ से आप यह सीख पाएंगे कि कैसे कठिन से कठिन बातों को भी आसानी से सीखा जा सकता है। सर के पढ़ाने का रोचक तरीका सहज ही विषय के प्रति रुचि जगा देता है। जब आप इनसे गुजरेंगे तो इस बात को महसूस कर सकेंगे। इसमें मोटिवेशन, हास्य विनोद तथा जीवन से जुड़ी कुछ महत्त्वपूर्ण बातें होती हैं।

यह वीडियो क्लिप डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की एथिक्स क्लास की है। इस वीडियो के माध्यम से आप यह समझ पाएंगे कि सीखने के अलग-अलग तरीकों में कौन-सा बेहतर है? आमतौर पर हम किताबों से ही जीवन की हर सीख प्राप्त कर लेना चाहते हैं, लेकिन व्यावहारिक रूप से ऐसा संभव नहीं होता। एक सीमा के बाद सीखने की यह पद्धति काम नहीं आती। इस वीडियो में सर इसी विषय पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं कि बेहतर व्यक्तित्व के लिये सीखने की प्रक्रिया को किस प्रकार साधा जाना चाहिये। प्रसिद्ध मनोवैज्ञानिक डेनियल गोलमेन के सिद्धांत को सर रोचक उदाहरण के माध्यम से बता रहे हैं।

#ShortVideos #VikasSir #InterestingMoments

You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 26th Feb 2021
 
Kannana Kanne is a family drama serial on Sun TV. Goutham, a rich businessman despises his daughter Meera as he holds her responsible for the loss of his beloved wife and immense wealth on the day she was born. Though Meera shares a special bond with her stepmother and stepsister, she grows up yearning for her father’s love and affection. Will destiny pave the way for Meera to win over her father’s heart.

snippet.title: Can James Save The Weeknd's Super Bowl Halftime?
snippet.description:
James Corden pays The Weeknd a visit during rehearsals for his Pepsi Super Bowl LV Halftime Show to offer some unwarranted advice. From focus to choreography, James has plenty of tips for making sure The Weeknd delivers on the big stage. #SBLV

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Chamoli Glacier Burst: Uttarakhand में ITBP के जवानों ने सुरंग में फंसे लोगों को निकाला (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
उत्तराखंड में चमोली ज़िले के तपोवन में आईटीबीपी के जवानों ने एक सुरंग में फंसे 16 लोगों को निकाल लिया है. हिमालयी ग्लेशियर टूटने के बाद ये लोग सुरंग में फंस गए थे.  उत्तराखंड में हिमालयी ग्लेशियर के फटने से कई ज़िलों को हाई अलर्ट किया गया है. 
उत्तराखंड के मुख्यमंत्री त्रिवेंद्र सिंह रावत ने खुद घटनास्थल का जायजा लिया. फिलहाल हालात काबू में बताए जा रहे हैं. आईटीबीपी, भारतीय सेना और एनडीआरएफ़ के जवान राहत-बचाव कार्य में लगे हैं. 

#ChamoliGlacierBurst #Uttarakhand #ITBP

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

बीबीसी हिंदी का एंड्रॉयड ऐप डाउनलोड करने के लिए क्लिक करें- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=uk.co.bbc.hindi

snippet.title: Al Ahly v Bayern Munich | FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 | Match Highlights

Robert Lewandowski bagged a brace as FC Bayern Munich advanced to the FIFA Club World Cup Final after a victory against Egypt’s Al Ahly SC. The UEFA Champions League winners will face Tigres UANL of Mexico in the Qatar 2020 decider on Thursday 11 February.

snippet.description:

RVCJ Originals presents the new web series “FRIEND REQUEST”, starring Badri Chavan, Anjali Barot, Arun Kushwah (Chote Miyan), Pratish Mehta and Mehek Mehra.

Friend Request is a story revolving around a bunch of Engineering students and their fights as their lives are intertwined with a mischievous comment made by Munni on their engineering group. This leads to an epic war amongst all of them, especially between Vikram & Aditi who have taken this fight too personally. Will the blast from the past spoil Vikram and Aditi's relation forever? snippet.description:
#SabjiMasalabyEatYammiecious
#garamMasala #sabji

*Ingredients for special sabji garam masala:-

1/4cup - Cumin
1/4cup - Coriander Seeds
1tbs - Fennel
1/4ts - Fenugreek Seeds
3-4 whole - Black Cardamom
1 large - Star Anise
4 small - Cinnamon Stick
2 small - Mace
1 small piece - Nutmeg
5-6 whole - Green Cardamom
2tbs - Black Pepper Corn
1/2tbs - Cloves
2-3 large - Bay Leaf
6-7 - Cashews

snippet.title: CHEESE BURST MAGGI SANDWICH | Cooking With Anmol | Funny Vlog | Best Maggi Recipe
snippet.description:
CHEESE BURST MAGGI SANDWICH | COOKING WITH ANMOL | FUNNY VLOG | BEST MAGGI RECIPE
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Visit the Policy Bazaar website & checkout their investment plans!
http://bit.ly/PolicyBazaarAS
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Since we all love Maggi, in the previous episodes of  ‘Cooking with Anmol’ we made the tastiest cheese Maggi & street style masala maggi & you guys loved it!

In today’s funny vlog (episode 4) I reveal my secret best Maggi recipe of the tastiest cheese burst Maggi sandwich ever. We will make a liquid cheese Maggi sandwich in my easy to make style & of course there will be lot of masti, fails, comedy & fun!

Trust me, this will be the most funny & entertaining cooking vlog you will ever see! You’ll surely feel like eating Maggi by the end of this funny video.
Tasty Maggi sandwich kaise banaye? AISE banaye!

Do watch till the end as this video gets funnier by the passing minute!

snippet.title: ദിലീപിനൊപ്പം കാവ്യയെ റിസെപ്ഷനില്‍ വച്ച് കണ്ട് മഞ്ജുവാര്യര്‍ l Antony Perumbavoor Daughter Marriage
snippet.description:
മലയാള സിനിമയുടെ പ്രിയ താരരാജാവാണ് നടൻ മോഹൻലാൽ. ലാലേട്ടന്റെ പ്രിയ സന്തതസഹചാരിയും മനസ്സ് സൂക്ഷിപ്പുകാരൻ എന്ന് വിശേഷാപ്പാവുന്ന ആന്റണി പെരുമ്പാവൂരിന്റെ മകളുടെ വിവാഹ വീഡിയോ കഴിഞ്ഞ ദിവസം പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയിരുന്നു.  വീഡിയോയിലുളളത് . വിവാഹ ചടങ്ങിന്റെയും സത്കാരത്തിന്റെയും ദൃശ്യങ്ങളാണ്. മലയാളത്തിന്റെ താരരാജാവ് തന്നെ ഫെയ്സ്ബുക്ക് പേജിൽ വീഡിയോ  പങ്കുവച്ചിട്ടുമുണ്ട്. ഡിസംബറിൽ നടന്ന എമിലിന്റെയും അനിഷയുടെയും വിവാഹ വീഡിയോയാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ പുറത്തിറക്കിയത്.
Photo Credit : Jackson James Photography

#Mohanlal #KavyaMadhavan #Dileep #Parvathy #jayaram #Tovinothomas #UnniMukundhan #Mammootty #jayasurya #PrithvirajSukumaran #NazriyaNazim #FahadhFaasil  #PranavMohanlal #AntonyPerumbavoor #marriage #AnishaAntony  #AshishAntony #Emil #Suchithra #Pranav #Vismaya #Engagement #Shanthi #HoneyRose

snippet.title: RiRi (Rihanna) Song By Diljit Dosanjh | Intense | Raj Ranjodh
snippet.description:
Presenting RiRi (Rihanna) full audio song performed by DILJIT DOSANJH 
SUBSCRIBE to channel ► https://bit.ly/diljitdosanjhchannel
 #DiljitDosanjh

Song: RiRi
Singer: Diljit Dosanjh
Lyricist - Raj Ranjodh 
Music - Intense

Lyrics Translation:-

Oh Beautiful One of Barbados, 
Your skin tone golden as though born of wheat.
Raj (lyricist) salutes the Almighty, 
Who set this Angelic Beauty on Earth.

I'll gift you a special Patiala Style Outfit,
I'll buy you Anklets, I'm Crazy for you.
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

You have big wide eyes, 
you are a true treasure of Beauty
I'll be at your Concert, wearing a Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

Oh the things your eyes do to us,
You have Punjabi Fans crazy for you, Ms. Fenty Beauty
The Breadth of your Fan Base makes the haters burn with jealousy
In the middle of the night, tossed them haters into trolley

The world is in a Trance behind your sway
Oh Rihanna, Oh Rihanna
Try on this Punjabi Outfit i had sewn for you from Moga, Oh Rihanna
I'll be at your concert wearing Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

snippet.title: Tujhse Mehka | College Romance 2 | Prashant Soni & Tusshar Mallek
snippet.description:
Hum along your favorite song from College Romance season 2, Tujhse Mehka, expressing and experiencing love in the purest form, featuring the mesmerising voice of Prashant Soni. Enjoy and share with your loved ones.

Credits: 
Song: Tujhse Mehka
Singer: Prashant Soni
Lyrics: Prashant Soni
Producer: Tusshar Mallek
Composer: Prashant Soni

Stream Music from the Show: https://smarturl.it/CR2Music

Lyrics:
Tujhse mehka mehka sa hun main
Kuch aise jaaniya'n
Jag kasturi mennu lagda
Jo sang tu ho haaniya'n
Behti fiza ko main chumu
Ban Ranjhana fir fir ghumu
Kisi shor sa main yun gunjuu'n
Lekar naam tera...

Je tu mileya mennu taan jinve'n
Rab mileya
Murshad mileya
Jinve'n noor mileya
Ishq Da rang maanhi jinve'n
Guda hoya
Je mennu tu mileya
Mere Rangreza...

Ishq tere da
Libas pehenke
Din raat main shagan manawa'n
Dur jaave'n jo
Nazraa'n to tuu
Tennu seene de wich lukawa'n

Tu kol rave'n te khilda rawaa'n
Shaidai ban ban main firaa'n
Hun khud to'n khokar mil gaya
Main tere wich sajnaa..

Je tu mileya mennu taan jinvey
Rab mileya

snippet.title: சசிகலா காரில் இருந்து அதிமுக கொடி அகற்றம்
snippet.description:
#SasikalaReturn | #Sasikala | #AMMK | #AIADMK

சசிகலா பயணித்து வந்த காரில் இருந்து அதிமுக கொடி அகற்றம்

பெங்களூரில் இருந்து அதிமுக கொடி கட்டிய காரில் வந்த சசிகலா தற்போது வேறு காரில் பயணம்

தமிழக எல்லைக்குள் நுழைந்த போது சசிகலா வேறு ஒரு காரில் மாறி பயணம் செய்து வருகிறார்

சசிகலா மாறி அமர்ந்துள்ள வேறு காரிலும் அதிமுக கொடி கட்டப்பட்டுள்ளது

சொத்து குவிப்பு வழக்கில் 4 ஆண்டு சிறை தண்டனை முடிந்து தமிழகம் திரும்பினார் சசிகலா

The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. snippet.description:

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: ગુજરાતમાં ટિકિટ ન મળતાં નરેન્દ્ર મોદીનાં ભત્રીજીએ સી. આર. પાટિલની નવી નીતિ વિશે શું કહ્યું?
snippet.description:
ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીઓમાં ટિકિટ ફાળવણીને લઈને હાલ ભાજપમાં કેટલીક જગ્યાએ અસંતોષ ચાલી રહ્યો છે. હવે વડા પ્રધાન નરેન્દ્ર મોદીનાં ભત્રીજી સોનલ મોદીએ પણ પોતાને ટિકિટ ન મળતાં દુખની લાગણી વ્યક્ત કરી છે. તેમણે કહ્યું કે તેમને મોદીનાં ભત્રીજી તરીકે નહીં પરંતુ તેમના કામના કારણે ઓળખવામાં આવે. જુઓ બીબીસી સાથેની મુલાકાત મામલે તેમણે શું કહ્યું?

વીડિયો : તેજસ વૈદ્ય\ઉત્સવ ગજ્જર  

#gujarat #localbodyelection #narendramodi #prahladmodi #gujaratbjp

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો :

snippet.title: Indulekha - Preview | Full EP free on SUN NXT | 08 Feb 2021 | Surya TV | Malayalam Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Preview of the New Malayalam Serial #Indulekha that airs on Surya TV. 
 
 You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

#Indulekha #SuryaTV #MalayalamSerial 

Indulekha is a family drama serial on Surya TV. The story is about a girl, Indulekha who faces the untimely death of her father, loss of their vast wealth and forced out of their huge home, along with her mother and sister, all on her wedding day. Follow Indulekha, on her journey of survival as she rises from the ashes, to regain her family’s lost glory and reclaim what is rightfully hers.

snippet.title: Vallamai Tharayo | EP 76 | YouTube Exclusive | Digital Daily Series | 08-02-2021
snippet.description:
Co-presented by ITC Aashirvaad Superior MP Atta Vallamai Tharayo -https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list...
Buy Aashirvaad atta now like Abhirami to make easy to make recipes from Aashirvaad Atta’s Cookbook: http://bit.ly/aashirvaadcookbook
விகடன் டெலிவிஸ்டாஸ் மற்றும் மோஷன் கன்டென்ட் குரூப் நிறுவனங்கள் இணைந்து தயாரிக்கும் இந்தியாவின் முதல் யூடியூப் டெய்லி சீரிஸ் `வல்லமை தாராயோ’. திங்கள் முதல் வெள்ளிவரை இரவு 7.00 மணிக்கு யூடியூபில் (https://goo.gl/QiBz7h) மட்டும் ஒளிபரப்பாகத் தொடங்கியிருக்கும் இந்த சீரிஸ் ஒரு பெண்ணின் வாழ்க்கையையும், அவளின் உணர்வுகளையும் மையப் படுத்தியது. Presenting the latest episode of #VallamaiTharayo - India's 1st #DailyDigitalSeries on #YouTube from the house of Vikatan Televistas & Motion Content Group. #VikatanDigitalDaily #YouTubePremiumDaily 

Story & Screenplay by 'Kolangal' V. Thiruselvam, directed by Chidambaram Manivannan, starring Shali Nivekas, VJ Parvathy, Vivek Rajagopal, Kaushick, Saranya Ravichandran and R S Shivaji with a host of others, this series runs Monday to Friday, 7 PM only on YouTube. Subscribe to our channel to stay tuned.

Director  Chidambaram Manivannan
Story & Screenplay  ‘Kolangal’ V. Thiruselvam
Additional Screenplay Veki Amirtharaj
Cinematographer Sathya Venkataraman
Music Director K.C. Balasarangan
Editor Chandru.B
Art Director Vasu Dhevan
Sound Design K Dileep
Dialogues Paari Ayyasami
Additional Dialogues Rajkamal Bharathi
Lyricist Aravind Kumar
Colourist Karthick Chandrasekar
Designer Pradeep Raj
Subtitles  Dhi Subtitles

Vikatan and Motion Content Group, in association with YouTube, present a Digital Daily, exclusively on YouTube. Please show some love to 'Vallamai Tharayo' (trans. Give me the strength). Vikatan's first 'Digital Only' outing, a daily that shall not be on TV but only on YouTube.  This offering from Vikatan that shall join #VikatanPrimeTime in the company of Alaigal, Kolangal, Thirumathi Selvam, Thendral, Azhagi and the currently running show on SUN TV - Naayagi.
Around 22 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been more than 2 decades of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas#FromTheHouseOfVikatanAndMotionContentGroup #Vikatan #DigitalDailySeries

snippet.title: Chamoli Glacier Breaks | Uttarakhand तबाही में Rishiganga Power Project पूरी तरह ध्वस्त
snippet.description:
उत्तराखंड (Uttarakhand) के चमोली (Chamoli) जिले के जोशीमठ (Joshimath) के रैणी गांव में ग्लेशियर फटने (Glacier bursts) से पूरे इलाके में सैलाब आ गया है.  धौलगंगा नदी (Dhauliganga River) का जलस्तर अचानक बढ़ गया है, इससे ऋषिगंगा पावर प्रोजेक्ट (Rishiganga Power Project) ध्वस्त हो चुका है. पहाड़ी इलाके में हिमस्खलन (Avalanche) होने से हालात बिगड़ गए हैं. राज्य सरकार ने इस घटना के मद्देनजर श्रीनगर, ऋषिकेश, अलकनंदा समेत अन्य इलाकों के लिए अलर्ट जारी किया है और अलकनंदा की तरफ ने जाने की सलाह दी है. बड़े पैमाने पर जान-माल के नुकसान की आशंका जताई जा रही है. ग्लेशियर के बर्फ टूट कर धौलगंगा नदी में बह रहे हैं.  इस बीच राहत और बचाव अभियान बड़े स्तर पर जारी है. 170 लोगों के फंसे होने की आशंका है. वहीं अब तक दस शव मिल चुके हैं.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

snippet.title: Priyamudan Geetha - Nakkalites
snippet.description:
Watch Master Now on Amazon Prime Video, Click here - http://amzn.to/Master

Nakkalites presents “Priyamudan Geetha.” Nakkalites new video is about Geetha, who is a big fan of actor Vijay. She grew up sticking his posters to let people know about his movies. But, she got the biggest shock of her life when she learned that his fiancé doesn’t like Vijay. He’s a workaholic. 

Geetha always loved cinema, but her husband won’t show any interest.  Her son also never felt the need to take her along to the theatre.

Geetha sacrificed her passion for movies to be a loyal wife. But, is it justifiable? What do the father and son will do to make Geetha happy? 

Watch the movie “Master” starring Vijay with Geeta and her family. Master on Prime!

Also, subscribe to the Youtube channel Nakkalites for comedy videos.

#Priyamudangeetha #Thalapathyfan #Nakkalites

Watch the latest Episode of the New Malayalam Serial #Indulekha that airs on Surya TV.
 
 You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021

#Indulekha #SuryaTV #MalayalamSerial

Indulekha is a family drama serial on Surya TV. The story is about a girl, Indulekha who faces the untimely death of her father, loss of their vast wealth and forced out of their huge home, along with her mother and sister, all on her wedding day. Follow Indulekha, on her journey of survival as she rises from the ashes, to regain her family’s lost glory and reclaim what is rightfully hers.
